heading: Special rule
label: 2306 Special rule
text: In the case of a local community in which no employees are represented by a labor organization, for purposes of this chapter, the term “representatives of employees” shall be substituted for “labor organization”.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 2306, , as added , , , related to special rule, prior to the general amendment of this chapter by .Pub. L. 88–210, § 7Pub. L. 105–332, § 1(b)112 Stat. 3083Pub. L. 109–270Oct. 31, 1998
